blog_posts_scope_check.name: blog_posts_scope_check
blog_posts_scope_check.value: (organization_id IS NULL AND site_id IS NULL) OR (organization_id IS NOT NULL AND site_id IS NOT NULL)

blog_posts_category_check.name: blog_posts_category_check
blog_posts_category_check.value: site_id IS NOT NULL OR category IS NOT NULL

booking_policies_reservation_location_un.name: booking_policies_reservation_location_unique
booking_policies_reservation_location_un.where: policy_type = 'reservation' AND scope_type = 'location' AND location_id IS NOT NULL

booking_policies_experience_location_uni.name: booking_policies_experience_location_unique
booking_policies_experience_location_uni.where: policy_type = 'experience' AND scope_type = 'location' AND location_id IS NOT NULL

booking_policies_experience_scope_unique.name: booking_policies_experience_scope_unique
booking_policies_experience_scope_unique.where: policy_type = 'experience' AND scope_type = 'experience' AND experience_id IS NOT NULL
